title: Er der en boligboble på vej i København?
summary_md:
# Er der en boligboble på vej i København?

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-06-14  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode debates whether Copenhagen is heading toward a housing bubble, with a CBS finance professor arguing the term is misused and that high Copenhagen apartment prices are rational—driven by urbanization, growth expectations (analogous to growth stocks vs. provincial 'value' housing), and supply constraints. The hosts conclude there is no sign of an imminent bubble burst, though prices could still fall due to unforeseen shocks. No equities are analyzed for investment purposes.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
